'''Gaph''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ryn/Legends|Ryn]] refugee from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Gyndine/Legends|Gyndine]]. During the [[Battle of Gyndine]] he was evacuated along with his fellow Ryn [[Melisma]] to the world of [[Ruan]]. While searching for [[Droma]], he was approached by two individuals known as [[Tall]] and [[Short]], who asked him to forge official documents to get the rich off of Roan in exchange for their own safe passage. Agreeing, they left the planet just as Droma and [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] arrived. Gaph eventually wound up stranded on [[Fondor/Legends|Fondor]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]'' {{1st}}
